message:
🐛 Wire real compliance data into Stats Overview blocks (#2117)

Replace the getCompliancePosture() mock function with real data from
useKyverno, useKubescape, and useTrivy hooks. Each stat block now shows
live data when its corresponding tool is installed on at least one
cluster, and falls back to demo data with isDemo: true (yellow border +
flask icon) when the tool is not installed.

- Kyverno violations: real from policy reports when installed
- Kubescape score, CIS, NSA: real from scan summaries when installed
- Trivy vulnerabilities, critical/high CVEs: real from vuln reports
- Gatekeeper, Falco, PCI-DSS: always demo (hooks not implemented)
- Overall score/checks/passing/failing: aggregated from all real tools
- Pass isDemoData to DashboardPage when no tools are installed

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
